verdict.summary: Round 3 remains clean. The diff consistently migrates user-facing repository links from github.com/jeswr/sparq to github.com/sparq-org/sparq, including the generated served-conformance reference. The regression test scans the real site/src filesystem, checks both stale origins, and reports actionable file/line evidence. Its two narrowly documented exclusions correspond to sibling-owned paths; only command-palette.tsx currently contains a stale origin, so the exclusion behavior matches the stated transition scope. No correctness, soundness, security, or test-validity defect is present in this diff.
